message:
style(core): apply rustfmt to agent autoconfig and detection enrichment integration tests

Purely mechanical formatting: import reordering (items before functions),
expanding compressed array literals to one-element-per-line, expanding
compressed assert_eq!/assert! macro calls to multi-line form, and
collapsing unnecessary multi-line patterns. No test logic changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
